content.full_text:
November 29, 1990

Mr. Scott Hallabrin  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Scott:

This is to confirm your telephone advice to me on this date that a ballot measure committee may be established under the Act to defend Proposition 73. You also stated that Assemblyman Johnson may transfer funds from his officeholder account to the ballot measure committee in order that the committee may reimburse Senator Kopp for Proposition 73 litigation expenses.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[signature]

L. MICHAEL BOGERT  
Senior Assistant

LMB:ll
